mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS (USER_ID, USER_PW, USER_NM, USER_EMAIL, NICKNAME, GENDER, BIRTH, REG_DT) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userPw}, #{userNm}, #{userEmail}, #{nickname}, #{gender}, #{birth}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_EMAIL, NICKNAME, GENDER, BIRTH, REG_DT FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_ID, USER_PW, USER_NM, NICKNAME FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
